description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The transfer of 20.6 million USDS from the Surplus Buffer to the Spark SubProxy for the Genesis Capital Allocation must be included in the June 26, 2025 Executive Vote. This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
This amount reflects that 4.4 million USDS of pre-TGE expenses were paid by Sky as specified in [A.2.

.2.2.2.8.4 - Treatment of Expenses Paid By Sky Pre-TGE](f3672ca1-b305-4e16-86f0-3dc3267073bb). This includes 2 million USDS transferred from the Sky Ecosystem Liquidity Bootstrapping Budget to Spark to provide liquidity to market makers and 2.4 million USDS transferred from the Ecosystem Liquidity Bootstrapping Budget to Spark to provide liquidity to exchanges. See [A.2.
.2.2.2.8.4.1 - Transfer From Liquidity Bootstrapping Budget To Spark For Market Makers](66abd123-f5cd-4d1a-bf75-2e5f468eae16) and [A.2.
.2.2.2.8.4.2 - Transfer From Liquidity Bootstrapping Budget To Spark For Exchanges](1d7924cd-8105-458f-a959-92f302b971d4).
